title: Koko Eating Bananas
input_format: An integer array `piles` where `piles[i]` is the number of bananas in the `ith` pile, and an integer `h` representing the time limit.
output_format: The minimum integer `k` such that Koko can eat all bananas within `h` hours.
function_signature: function minEatingSpeed(piles: number[], h: number): number {}
